objective: Use a low-risk governance validator as a dry-run target to verify CodeGraph impact report value without project business development.

codegraph_queries.purpose: Locate the validator and directly referenced constants.
Read the target validator through CodeGraph and inspect indexed dependents.
Select impacted tests for the validator change.
Find adjacent reusable project-group validator patterns.
Negative control showing broad symbol queries are too noisy for evidence.

rg_baseline.command: rg -n "validate_codegraph_project_group_steady_state_verify|CODEGRAPH-PROJECT-GROUP-STEADY-STATE-VERIFY-20260621|GPCF-CODEGRAPH-PROJECT-GROUP-STEADY-STATE-VERIFY-004|GPCF-CODEGRAPH-IMPACT-REPORT-DRY-RUN-005" docs tools governance harness loop 09-status
rg_baseline.limitation: rg finds text locations but does not classify symbols, dependents, affected tests, or noisy symbol risk.

reasons: No affected tests reported by CodeGraph
No indexed dependents reported by CodeGraph node

value_assessment.context_precision: CodeGraph query returned the target validator and its evidence constants directly.
value_assessment.impact_precision: CodeGraph affected returned zero affected tests and zero traversed dependents for the validator file.
value_assessment.noise_control: A broad main-symbol impact query returned 101 affected symbols and is explicitly rejected for gate evidence.
value_assessment.cost_signal: Targeted CodeGraph commands reduced manual text scanning from 16 matched files and 31 text lines to a direct file/symbol/test impact set.
value_assessment.quality_signal: The report separates changed files, impacted symbols, impacted docs, impacted tests, risk, and validation plan.
